hero.heading:
Barber shop
Manekena
hero.tagline: Your neighborhood barbershop — 4.8★ from local regulars

about.heading: Craft you can trust
about.body: At Barber shop Manekena, we believe a great haircut isn't a luxury — it's a standard. We've been serving the Hristo Botev neighborhood for years with honest craft, genuine care, and prices that leave something in your pocket. Our clients keep coming back not because they have no choice, but because the result is worth it.

values.title: Friendly atmosphere
values.desc: A place where every client feels welcome from the moment they walk in

values.title: Skilled hands
values.desc: A perfect cut and a precisely shaped beard — every single time

values.title: Fair prices
values.desc: Quality you can feel, at a price that makes sense

services.heading: What we do
services.subheading: Contact us directly for current pricing

items.name: Men's Haircut
items.desc: Classic or modern style — clean finish, precise work every time

items.name: Beard Trim
items.desc: Clean lines, balanced shape, sharp look

items.name: Beard Conditioning
items.desc: Deep conditioning for a softer, healthier, shinier beard

items.name: Beard Dyeing
items.desc: Precise application with a natural, clean finish

items.name: Fade
items.desc: Smooth gradient from skin to your desired length

items.name: Curly Hair Cut
items.desc: Specialist cutting technique tailored to your curl pattern

items.name: Hair Coloring
items.desc: Full color treatment with care for both result and hair health

team.heading: Hands you can trust
team.body: Behind every great result are hands that know their craft. At Manekena, we work with attention to detail — we don't rush, because good work never should be. Come meet us in person at your next visit.

testimonials.text: Excellent barbershop. Precise work, pleasant atmosphere, and prices you won't regret. I recommend it to everyone.
testimonials.author: Satisfied client

testimonials.text: I've been coming here for two years. Every time I leave looking perfect. Number one barbershop in Varna for me.
testimonials.author: Regular client

testimonials.text: Friendly service and skilled hands. Meticulous attention to both hair and beard. I'll definitely be back.
testimonials.author: Client

location.heading: Find us
location.address: 25 Kapitan Raycho Nikolov St., Hristo Botev / Odesos, 9000 Varna, Bulgaria

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.success_body: We'll be in touch shortly to confirm your appointment. You can also confirm directly via WhatsApp.
booking.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
